description:
Overview:

Improve Outdoor Feeding: Our travel dog water bottle allows easy feeding wherever you go. it on any backpack or wrist with its sturdy lanyard, making outdoor feeding easy, even for fussy pets.

Effortless Drinking: Ingeniously designed for outdoors pups, this travel dog water bottle boasts a large capacity to carry ample water and food, ensuring your pet's nutritional needs are met throughout the day with high practicality.

Leakproof Design: Enjoy well-maintained and safe hydration with our travel dog water bottle. The sealed design and perfect sealing performance lock in freshness for prolonged periods and prevents any leaks in all environments.

Suitabfle for Most Occasionbs: Keep your furry companion hydrating during outdoor activities with this travel dog water bottle. Equipped with a special cup that allows pets to easily drink, you can add water in time and monitor the water level at a glance to ensure maximum hydration. A must-have for walks, hikes and other outdoor adventures.

Multiple Usage: Seamlessly integrating a water dispenser with a food container, this travel dog water bottle simplifies your packing by merging two pet feeding must-haves into 1 convenient 2-in-1 function.


Product information:
Specifications: water and grain integration-dry wet separation) green-with lanyard, water and grain integration-dry wet separation) pink-with lanyard, water and grain integration-dry wet separation) Gray-with lanyard, water and grain integration-dry wet separation) yellow-with lanyard
Material: PP PET
Category: Pet tableware
Folding size: 20cm * 9cm
Product Application: cat, dog
Capacity: 690ml


Packing list:
1* Feeder
